name: Golden Dawn
description: The 78-card Golden Dawn tarot deck (Book T tradition): 22 Major Arcana and 56 Minor Arcana across Wands, Cups, Swords and Pentacles, with the Golden Dawn court of King, Queen, Prince and Princess. Titles follow the Hermetic Order of the Golden Dawn; meanings are concise divinatory readings.

cards.name: The Fool
cards.title: The Spirit of Aether
cards.upright: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, a leap of faith into the unknown.
cards.reversed: Recklessness, naivety, hesitation, a foolish or ill-considered step.

cards.name: The Magician
cards.title: The Magus of Power
cards.upright: Will, focused power, skill, manifestation of intention into action.
cards.reversed: Manipulation, scattered will, untapped or misused talent.

cards.name: The High Priestess
cards.title: The Priestess of the Silver Star
cards.upright: Intuition, hidden knowledge, the subconscious, sacred mystery.
cards.reversed: Secrets withheld, disconnection from intuition, surface over depth.

cards.name: The Empress
cards.title: Daughter of the Mighty Ones
cards.upright: Abundance, nurturing, fertility, creativity, the fruitful earth.
cards.reversed: Stagnation, creative block, smothering, neglect of self or others.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.title: Son of the Morning, Chief among the Mighty
cards.upright: Structure, authority, stability, disciplined leadership.
cards.reversed: Rigidity, domination, loss of control, misused power.

cards.name: The Hierophant
cards.title: Magus of the Eternal Gods
cards.upright: Tradition, spiritual guidance, teaching, shared belief and order.
cards.reversed: Dogma, rebellion against convention, hollow ritual.

cards.name: The Lovers
cards.title: Children of the Voice Divine, the Oracles of the Mighty Gods
cards.upright: Union, love, alignment of values, a meaningful choice of the heart.
cards.reversed: Disharmony, misalignment, a difficult or avoided choice.

cards.name: The Chariot
cards.title: Child of the Powers of the Waters, Lord of the Triumph of Light
cards.upright: Willful triumph, forward drive, control through balanced opposites.
cards.reversed: Loss of direction, forces pulling apart, aggression without aim.

cards.name: Strength
cards.title: Daughter of the Flaming Sword, Leader of the Lion
cards.upright: Courage, inner strength, gentle mastery of instinct, patience.
cards.reversed: Self-doubt, raw impulse, force where softness was needed.

cards.name: The Hermit
cards.title: Magus of the Voice of Light, the Prophet of the Gods
cards.upright: Solitude, inner search, wisdom, the guiding inner lamp.
cards.reversed: Isolation, withdrawal, refusing counsel, lost in the dark.

cards.name: Wheel of Fortune
cards.title: Lord of the Forces of Life
cards.upright: Cycles, turning fate, fortune, a pivotal change of circumstance.
cards.reversed: Resistance to change, a downturn, feeling at the mercy of events.

cards.name: Justice
cards.title: Daughter of the Lords of Truth, the Ruler of the Balance
cards.upright: Truth, fairness, cause and effect, accountability and balance.
cards.reversed: Imbalance, evasion of responsibility, unfairness, bias.

cards.name: The Hanged Man
cards.title: The Spirit of the Mighty Waters
cards.upright: Surrender, suspension, a new perspective gained by letting go.
cards.reversed: Stalling, useless sacrifice, resistance to necessary release.

cards.name: Death
cards.title: Child of the Great Transformers, Lord of the Gates of Death
cards.upright: Endings and transformation, the clearing away that makes room for renewal.
cards.reversed: Clinging to what is over, stalled transition, fear of change.

cards.name: Temperance
cards.title: Daughter of the Reconcilers, the Bringer Forth of Life
cards.upright: Balance, moderation, patient blending, healing synthesis.
cards.reversed: Excess, imbalance, impatience, elements that will not mix.

cards.name: The Devil
cards.title: Lord of the Gates of Matter, Child of the Forces of Time
cards.upright: Bondage, attachment, material obsession, self-imposed chains.
cards.reversed: Breaking free, releasing an attachment, confronting a shadow.

cards.name: The Tower
cards.title: Lord of the Hosts of the Mighty
cards.upright: Sudden upheaval, revelation, the collapse of a false structure.
cards.reversed: Delayed disaster, resisting an unavoidable change, fear of ruin.

cards.name: The Star
cards.title: Daughter of the Firmament, Dweller between the Waters
cards.upright: Hope, renewal, serene faith, inspiration after hardship.
cards.reversed: Despair, lost faith, disconnection from hope.

cards.name: The Moon
cards.title: Ruler of Flux and Reflux, Child of the Sons of the Mighty
cards.upright: Illusion, dreams, the unconscious, uncertainty in the dark.
cards.reversed: Confusion lifting, released fear, or deepening deception.

cards.name: The Sun
cards.title: Lord of the Fire of the World
cards.upright: Joy, vitality, clarity, success and warmth revealed.
cards.reversed: Dimmed joy, temporary gloom, overexposure or delay of success.

cards.name: Judgement
cards.title: The Spirit of the Primal Fire
cards.upright: Awakening, reckoning, a calling, renewal and rebirth.
cards.reversed: Self-doubt, ignoring the call, refusing to face the past.

cards.name: The Universe
cards.title: The Great One of the Night of Time
cards.upright: Completion, wholeness, fulfillment, the closing of a great cycle.
cards.reversed: Incompletion, loose ends, a goal almost but not yet reached.

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.title: Root of the Powers of Fire
cards.upright: A spark of creation, inspiration, new energy and initiative.
cards.reversed: A false start, blocked energy, delayed inspiration.

cards.name: Two of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Dominion
cards.upright: Personal power, planning, bold vision and future dominion.
cards.reversed: Fear of the unknown, indecision, a plan left unmade.

cards.name: Three of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Established Strength
cards.upright: Expansion, foresight, ventures set in motion and progressing.
cards.reversed: Delays, obstacles abroad, plans that fail to launch.

cards.name: Four of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Perfected Work
cards.upright: Celebration, harmony, a stable foundation, homecoming.
cards.reversed: Tension at home, a shaky foundation, joy postponed.

cards.name: Five of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Strife
cards.upright: Conflict, competition, friction and clashing energies.
cards.reversed: Avoided conflict, inner tension, strife winding down.

cards.name: Six of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Victory
cards.upright: Victory, recognition, public success and earned acclaim.
cards.reversed: Fleeting praise, ego, a fall from favor, delayed reward.

cards.name: Seven of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Valour
cards.upright: Standing your ground, courage, defending a hard-won position.
cards.reversed: Overwhelmed, giving up ground, exhaustion from defending.

cards.name: Eight of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Swiftness
cards.upright: Swift movement, momentum, news and rapid developments.
cards.reversed: Delays, scattered energy, haste that misfires.

cards.name: Nine of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Great Strength
cards.upright: Resilience, persistence, the last stand before the finish.
cards.reversed: Depletion, defensiveness, worn down and wary.

cards.name: Ten of Wands
cards.title: Lord of Oppression
cards.upright: Burden, heavy responsibility, overload near the goal.
cards.reversed: Releasing a burden, delegation, or collapse under the weight.

cards.name: Princess of Wands
cards.title: Princess of the Shining Flame, the Rose of the Palace of Fire
cards.upright: Enthusiasm, bold curiosity, a fiery free spirit exploring.
cards.reversed: Impulsiveness, scattered passion, flighty energy.

cards.name: Prince of Wands
cards.title: Prince of the Chariot of Fire
cards.upright: Drive, adventure, charismatic action pursuing a vision.
cards.reversed: Rashness, impatience, energy without direction.

cards.name: Queen of Wands
cards.title: Queen of the Thrones of Flame
cards.upright: Warmth, confidence, magnetic vitality and creative command.
cards.reversed: Insecurity, jealousy, a smoldering or demanding nature.

cards.name: King of Wands
cards.title: King of the Chariot of Fire
cards.upright: Vision, bold leadership, mastery of one's creative fire.
cards.reversed: Domineering, impulsive rule, promises unbacked by action.

cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.title: Root of the Powers of Water
cards.upright: New love, emotional opening, compassion and the overflowing heart.
cards.reversed: Blocked feeling, emotional emptiness, love withheld.

cards.name: Two of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Love
cards.upright: Partnership, mutual attraction, connection and harmony.
cards.reversed: Imbalance, a rift, a connection cooling or strained.

cards.name: Three of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Abundance
cards.upright: Friendship, celebration, community and shared joy.
cards.reversed: Overindulgence, gossip, a fraying of the circle.

cards.name: Four of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Blended Pleasure
cards.upright: Apathy, contemplation, an offer unnoticed, emotional withdrawal.
cards.reversed: Renewed interest, accepting what is offered, coming out of the shell.

cards.name: Five of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Loss in Pleasure
cards.upright: Grief, regret, focus on loss while something still remains.
cards.reversed: Acceptance, moving on, recovering what was thought lost.

cards.name: Six of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Pleasure
cards.upright: Nostalgia, innocence, kindness, gifts from the past.
cards.reversed: Living in the past, outgrown attachments, naive sentiment.

cards.name: Seven of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Illusionary Success
cards.upright: Many choices, fantasy, temptation and wishful thinking.
cards.reversed: Clarity, a choice made, illusions dispelled.

cards.name: Eight of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Abandoned Success
cards.upright: Walking away, seeking deeper meaning, leaving what no longer fulfills.
cards.reversed: Fear of leaving, drifting, aimless staying or return.

cards.name: Nine of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Material Happiness
cards.upright: Contentment, a wish fulfilled, emotional satisfaction.
cards.reversed: Smugness, shallow pleasure, a wish that disappoints.

cards.name: Ten of Cups
cards.title: Lord of Perfected Success
cards.upright: Emotional fulfillment, harmony, lasting happiness and family peace.
cards.reversed: Discord, a broken ideal, harmony that rings hollow.

cards.name: Princess of Cups
cards.title: Princess of the Waters, the Lotus of the Palace of the Floods
cards.upright: Tender intuition, creativity, an open and dreaming heart.
cards.reversed: Emotional immaturity, escapism, moodiness.

cards.name: Prince of Cups
cards.title: Prince of the Chariot of the Waters
cards.upright: Emotional depth, romance, following the heart with intent.
cards.reversed: Moody idealism, unclear feelings, emotional manipulation.

cards.name: Queen of Cups
cards.title: Queen of the Thrones of the Waters
cards.upright: Compassion, deep intuition, emotional wisdom and care.
cards.reversed: Overwhelm, emotional dependence, boundaries dissolved.

cards.name: King of Cups
cards.title: King of the Chariot of the Waters
cards.upright: Emotional balance, diplomacy, a calm and caring mastery of feeling.
cards.reversed: Repressed emotion, moodiness, care turned to control.

cards.name: Ace of Swords
cards.title: Root of the Powers of Air
cards.upright: Breakthrough, clarity, truth cutting through confusion.
cards.reversed: Confusion, misused intellect, a truth turned harmful.

cards.name: Two of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Peace Restored
cards.upright: Stalemate, a hard choice, uneasy truce and blocked feeling.
cards.reversed: Indecision breaking, information revealed, release of tension.

cards.name: Three of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Sorrow
cards.upright: Heartbreak, painful truth, grief that must be felt.
cards.reversed: Healing, releasing pain, recovery from sorrow.

cards.name: Four of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Rest from Strife
cards.upright: Rest, recovery, retreat and mental recuperation.
cards.reversed: Restlessness, burnout, avoidance of needed rest.

cards.name: Five of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Defeat
cards.upright: Conflict, hollow victory, discord and self-interest.
cards.reversed: Reconciliation, making amends, releasing resentment.

cards.name: Six of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Earned Success
cards.upright: Transition, moving toward calmer waters, gradual recovery.
cards.reversed: Stuck, unfinished passage, resistance to moving on.

cards.name: Seven of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Unstable Effort
cards.upright: Strategy, stealth, acting alone or getting away with something.
cards.reversed: Exposure, conscience, a plan unraveling or confessed.

cards.name: Eight of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Shortened Force
cards.upright: Restriction, feeling trapped, self-imposed mental bondage.
cards.reversed: Release, seeing a way out, freeing oneself from limitation.

cards.name: Nine of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Despair and Cruelty
cards.upright: Anxiety, sleepless worry, fear magnified in the dark.
cards.reversed: Fear easing, hope returning, worry put in perspective.

cards.name: Ten of Swords
cards.title: Lord of Ruin
cards.upright: Painful ending, rock bottom, a decisive and final collapse.
cards.reversed: Recovery, the worst passed, survival and slow rising.

cards.name: Princess of Swords
cards.title: Princess of the Rushing Winds, the Lotus of the Palace of Air
cards.upright: Sharp curiosity, vigilance, a keen and truthful mind.
cards.reversed: Scattered thought, harsh words, restless suspicion.

cards.name: Prince of Swords
cards.title: Prince of the Chariot of the Winds
cards.upright: Quick thinking, ambition, ideas charging into action.
cards.reversed: Haste, ruthlessness, cleverness without direction.

cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.title: Queen of the Thrones of Air
cards.upright: Clear judgment, honesty, independent and perceptive.
cards.reversed: Coldness, harsh criticism, bitterness guarding old wounds.

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.title: King of the Chariot of the Winds
cards.upright: Intellectual authority, clarity, truth and principled judgment.
cards.reversed: Cold logic, manipulation, judgment without mercy.

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.title: Root of the Powers of Earth
cards.upright: A tangible opportunity, prosperity, a seed of material growth.
cards.reversed: A missed chance, poor planning, opportunity delayed.

cards.name: Two of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Harmonious Change
cards.upright: Balance, juggling priorities, adaptability amid change.
cards.reversed: Overwhelm, dropped balls, disorganization.

cards.name: Three of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Material Works
cards.upright: Craftsmanship, collaboration, skill recognized and built upon.
cards.reversed: Poor teamwork, mediocre work, lack of skill or care.

cards.name: Four of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Earthly Power
cards.upright: Security, saving, holding on, control of resources.
cards.reversed: Greed or release, clinging too tight, or loosening the grip.

cards.name: Five of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Material Trouble
cards.upright: Hardship, loss, insecurity, feeling left out in the cold.
cards.reversed: Recovery, help arriving, coming through hard times.

cards.name: Six of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Material Success
cards.upright: Generosity, giving and receiving, fair exchange and support.
cards.reversed: Strings attached, imbalance of power, debt or dependency.

cards.name: Seven of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Success Unfulfilled
cards.upright: Patience, long-term investment, assessing slow growth.
cards.reversed: Impatience, poor return, wasted effort or hasty giving up.

cards.name: Eight of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Prudence
cards.upright: Diligence, skill-building, dedicated and careful work.
cards.reversed: Perfectionism, uninspired labor, cutting corners.

cards.name: Nine of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Material Gain
cards.upright: Independence, self-reliance, earned comfort and refinement.
cards.reversed: Overwork, hollow luxury, dependence undermining freedom.

cards.name: Ten of Pentacles
cards.title: Lord of Wealth
cards.upright: Legacy, lasting wealth, family, roots and enduring security.
cards.reversed: Financial instability, family strife, a fragile legacy.

cards.name: Princess of Pentacles
cards.title: Princess of the Echoing Hills, the Rose of the Palace of Earth
cards.upright: Studiousness, a fresh practical opportunity, grounded curiosity.
cards.reversed: Distraction, procrastination, ungrounded plans.

cards.name: Prince of Pentacles
cards.title: Prince of the Chariot of Earth
cards.upright: Reliability, steady effort, patient progress toward a goal.
cards.reversed: Stubbornness, stagnation, obsession with results.

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.title: Queen of the Thrones of Earth
cards.upright: Nurturing abundance, practicality, grounded and generous care.
cards.reversed: Self-neglect, smothering, materialism over warmth.

cards.name: King of Pentacles
cards.title: King of the Chariot of Earth
cards.upright: Prosperity, security, disciplined and generous mastery of the material.
cards.reversed: Greed, stubbornness, wealth without generosity.
